headlines.title: Trump holds a Cabinet meeting
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as President Donald Trump holds a Cabinet meeting at the White House.

headlines.title: Deal or no deal? Trump’s social media posts add confusion to Iran conflict
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s social posts left a trail of confusion over the weekend as Iran negotiations continue.

headlines.title: Ken Paxton wins Republican Senate primary in Texas
headlines.description: NBC News projects that Trump-backed candidate Ken Paxton has defeated Sen. John Cornyn in the Republican Senate primary runoff in Texas. NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down the vote numbers and Ryan Chandler reports from Cornyn’s election headquarters.

headlines.title: Democratic Rep. Al Green unseated in primary with two incumbents
headlines.description: Freshman Rep. Christian Menefee defeated longtime Rep. Al Green in the Democratic primary runoff for Texas’ 18th Congressional District, NBC News projects, after a rare incumbent-on-incumbent matchup sparked by Republican-led redistricting efforts.

headlines.title: Democrat Johnny Garcia wins Texas House primary after rival’s antisemitic comments
headlines.description: Democrat Johnny Garcia has won his party’s primary in Texas’ 35th Congressional District, NBC News projects, defeating a rival whom party leaders had condemned for antisemitic comments as Democrats look to compete in a district Republicans redrew to their benefit

headlines.title: Rep. Julie Johnson unseated in Texas Democratic primary by predecessor Colin Allred
headlines.description: Former Rep. Colin Allred has unseated Rep. Julie Johnson.

headlines.title: Chemical Tank Implodes in Washington State, Killing at Least 1
headlines.description: Multiple workers are still missing after a chemical tank in Washington state imploded on Tuesday, killing at least one person. The now-destroyed chemical tank at a paper plant was holding nearly a million gallons of hazardous liquid before it ruptured. The cause of the accident remains unknown. NBC’s Morgan Chesky reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Vance opens up about his faith journey — and Usha’s central role
headlines.description: Vance spoke to NBC News in an interview that touched on Iran, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and the “anti-weaponization fund.”

headlines.title: New blood test is added an an option for colorectal cancer screenings
headlines.description: As cases continue to rise, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Society’s recommended screenings for colorectal cancer. It’s not meant to replace colonoscopies, but could help catch cancers when people might not get screened otherwise. NBC News' Erika Edwards reports on how effective the blood test is.

headlines.title: Teachers union president calls for limits on AI and screen time in schools
headlines.description: Randi Weingarten, president of the American Federation of Teachers, is backing a parent-led movement to restrict how much time elementary school students spend on laptops in class.

headlines.title: Four years after World Cup drama, Gio Reyna gets another shot with Team USA
headlines.description: Last week, Gio Reyna and his wife, Chloe, were sitting in a parking lot, outside a smoothie shop in Connecticut, waiting to hear if he’d made Team USA’s World Cup roster.

headlines.title: Bravo’s messy ‘Summer House’ reunion becomes a can’t-miss event
headlines.description: Warning: This story includes spoilers for part one of the “Summer House” Season 10 reunion.
